summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the redesigned Ecommify e-commerce dashboard. New light theme (white/slate-50 background), sidebar navigation, and all core features working correctly on both desktop and mobile.

PIN pad UI with dots indicator functional
Dashboard KPI cards (Przychód, Zysk, Koszty reklam, Cel) visible
Navigation to Wyniki page via sidebar
Navigation to Pomysły page via sidebar
Navigation to Zadania page via sidebar
Mobile hamburger menu toggle button present
Wyniki page with financial table loading

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI flows working on desktop and mobile)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete UI redesign tested successfully. New light theme with slate-50 background. Sidebar replaces bottom navigation on desktop (768px+). Hamburger menu works on mobile. All CRUD operations for Ideas, Tasks, Costs, Products working. Gaming elements (ranks) removed. Professional dashboard with KPI cards and quick actions.
